executives.name: Scott Melbye
executives.background: Mr. Melbye is a 40-year veteran of the nuclear energy industry having held leadership positions in major uranium mining companies. He is also the Executive Vice President of Uranium Energy Corp. and has served as President of the Uranium Producers of America.

executives.name: Sean Quinn
executives.background: Sean Quinn is Senior Vice-President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary. He joined Cameco in 1993 and has held various legal roles within the company.

board_of_directors.name: Ian Bruce
board_of_directors.background: Ian Bruce is the Chair of the Board. He is the former President and CEO of Peters & Co. Limited, an investment firm. He has extensive experience in investment banking and the oil and gas industry.
